🎬 CASTING – AKTORKA PO SZKOLE AKTORSKIEJ 🎬

Do znanego serialu telewizyjnego poszukujemy aktorki po szkole aktorskiej.

📍 Lokalizacja zdjęć: Wrocław
📅 Terminy zdjęciowe: 22 / 23 / 24 maja 2026
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 3000 zł brutto za 3 dni zdjęciowe
🚗 Dojazd oraz nocleg po stronie agencji
✨ Świetna przygoda i możliwość pracy przy dużej produkcji!

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres: [aktorzy@unagimedia.pl](mailto:aktorzy@unagimedia.pl)

W treści maila prosimy o przesłanie:
• imienia i nazwiska
• numeru telefonu
• wieku
• wzrostu
• nazwy ukończonej szkoły aktorskiej + linku do Filmu Polskiego
• zdjęcia portretowego
• zdjęcia sylwetki
• wideowizytówki
• demo aktorskiego

To Twój czas, nie zwlekaj i zgłoś się do nas!🎉

items.text:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“SEVEN TIMES, SEVENTH”***

**Director:** Hân Phạm

**Producers:** Shakil Jessa, Alger Ji-Liang

**Category:** Independent Short Film - Funded by BC Arts Council

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh, Hân Phạm

**Union Status:** UBCP/ACTRA ULB

**Compensation:** $150/day. Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-5, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, demo reel/resume (if you have) and tell us a little bit about yourself!

**LOGLINE:** After her death, Bay, a Vietnamese hairdresser, lingers as a spirit in her old salon. Over 49 Days, visits from her loved ones awaken memories of care, regret, and joy—revealing her quiet life as a matriarchal archive of survival and love.

****OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED****

**BAY - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, Late 40s-60s***

Bay is a middle-aged Vietnamese woman who arrived in Canada in the 80s as a boat woman. As the owner of a hair salon, she's hardworking, warm and caring, but is short-tempered and strict towards her staff and her family. Raising a child alone in unfamiliar land as a single mom, she hides the hardships and secrets of her past from her daughter, Dan. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HUONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Huong is a stay-at-home auntie and wife who frequents the beauty salon. She is casual and overly curious, loves gossip, and complains a lot about her husband, but is lighthearted at her core. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Hong is an experienced hairdresser and a friend of Bay. She is kind, understanding and open-minded. She likes to help others resolve conflicts. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (TWO LEAD ACTING ROLES)**

**Project Title:** Pill Popper

**Project Type:** Student Short Film

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Director:** Margaret White

**Producer:** Hayden Perlov / Vancouver Film School

**Casting Director:** Margaret White / Hayden Perlov

**Audition Dates:** Self-tapes due by May 22nd 2026

**Audition Location:** Self-tapes only

**Call Back Dates:** May 24th 2026

*Call Back location/time will be shared after reviewing auditions*

**Shooting Dates:** June 6th-7th 2026

**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area

**Rates:** Unpaid. Catering and craft service provided.

**Submission Instructions:** Please email **pillpopper_vfs@outlook.com** for submission instructions and sides and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for.

**Synopsis:**

Iris (female, 20-25) is in the depths of her clinical depression. Despite being against prescription medication, Iris’ depression reaches a point where she decides to take her prescribed medicine

for the first time. While on the medication, Iris’ life becomes healthy and sustainable. One night, spent playing games with her friends, Iris remembers why she was so against medication in the 

first place- the dehumanization she sees in it -and pours hers down the kitchen disposal. Once again unmedicated, Iris’ depression becomes the darkest it’s ever been. Desperate and unknowing what to do, she meets with her psychiatrist who guides her back to taking the prescribed medication.

**Character Breakdowns:**

IRIS

Female/Female Presenting

20-25

Open Ethnicity

Iris is stuck in an apathetic depression. With her medication, she’s thoughtful and gentle, and spends her time contemplating her favorite things. The chemicals are in her brain now, but that doesn’t mean she always feels it in her heart, causing her to sometimes become reserved and melancholic. Still, Iris goes through the motions of her day with a smile on her face and a new level of energy, compliant to her psychiatrist’s instructions.

DR. WELL 

Any Gender

45-65

Open Ethnicity

Dr. Well is a forbearing, well-seasoned psychiatrist who works attentively and conscientiously with patients of all ages. Dr Well’s priority is persistently achieving positive results through their patients. While the patient’s well-being is always at the forefront of Dr. Well’s practice, they diplomatically brush past the patient’s experience to get to the results of the current treatment, always searching for the best outcome.

**Notes:**

(TW) Please note this script contains brief discussion of self harm between Iris and Dr. Well and implied self harm and suicidal ideation for Iris. The topic will be approached sensitively and

compassionately, putting the actors' comfort and well-being first. Keep this in mind when submitting your audition. Resources/contacts will be available throughout production.

items.text:
📸 **POSZUKIWANI DZIECIĘCY MODELE W WIEKU 4-6 LAT** 

Szukamy małych modeli do wyjątkowej sesji foto i wideo! Jeśli Twoje dziecko czuje się swobodnie przed obiektywem i kocha przytulne wnętrza, to ogłoszenie jest dla Was ✨

📅 **SZCZEGÓŁY ZLECENIA:**
* **Kiedy:** Początek czerwca (dokładne daty do ustalenia)
* **Gdzie:** Sklep z meblami dziecięcymi w **Warszawie**
* **Zakres:** Łącznie **3 sesje** (każda ok. 1-2h). Można zgłosić się na jedną, dwie lub wszystkie trzy
* **Stylistyka:** Meble drewniane, scenografia w stylu skandynawskim i boho (przytulna, ciepła)

🎨 **O MNIE:**  Jestem **fotografem z 20-letnim stażem** i **projektantką** po studiach artystycznych. Zapewniam pełen profesjonalizm i luźną, pełną humoru atmosferę ✨

🌟 **CZEGO OCZEKUJEMY?**
* Wiek dziecka: **4-6 lat**
* Chęci do współpracy i cierpliwości podczas sesji

⏱ **PRZEBIEG SESJI:**
* **Oswojenie:** zaczynamy od krótkiego zapoznania, by dziecko poczuło się swobodnie w nowym miejscu
* **Naturalność:** sesja opiera się na zabawie i interakcji z meblami (czytanie, układanie zabawek) bez sztywnego pozowania
* **Foto & Wideo:** równolegle realizujemy ujęcia fotograficzne oraz krótkie nagrania wideo
* **Komfort:** pracujemy w tempie dziecka, dbając o przerwy i bezstresową atmosferę
* **Czas:** całość trwa od **1 do 2 godzin**, aby zachować dobrą zabawę i energię małego modela

💰 **WYNAGRODZENIE:** poproszę o wysłanie proponowanych stawek na priv

📩 **JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?** Proszę o komentarz z informacjami:
1. **Imię dziecka.**
2. **Dyspozycyjność:** w ilu sesjach możecie wziąć udział? (1, 2 czy 3)
3. Mile widziane aktualne zdjęcie (w komentarzu lub na priv)

W załączniku inspiracje znalezione w internecie jako wizualizacja pomysłu na sesję.
Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🧸

items.text:
‼️‼️CASTING CALL‼️‼️ 

CASTING CALL — HERE FALLS THE SHADOWNeo-Noir Action Thriller

Production Type: Independent Film 
(Proof of Concept)

Tone: Dark, grounded, psychological, emotionally drivenShoot 

Location: (Atlanta Ga)

Shoot Dates: (June/ July)

Compensation: (IMDB Credits, Negotiable)

‼️‼️ PROJECT OVERVIEW ‼️‼️

Here Falls the Shadow is a neo-noir action thriller exploring memory, identity, and violence through the story of a man who wakes up in the aftermath of a massacre with no recollection of who he is — only to discover he may be at the center of something far more dangerous than he understands.

This film blends grounded, brutal action with psychological tension, prioritizing performance, atmosphere, and emotional realism.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON – THEATRE – PROFIT SHARE

We are casting for a new revival/adaptation of **Sophocles’ Antigone**, presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**. Following the successful earlier staging of the production in April, we are now seeking new actors due to the unavailability of some previous cast members. We are looking for performers who are ready to jump straight into an active rehearsal process and work within a fast-paced ensemble environment.

Performances will take place on **8th and 9th August 2026** at the **Barons Court Theatre, London**.

This is an **independent, low-budget profit-share production**, developed by producer and actress **Ioanna Firaku** and director/co-producer **Una Reitere**. Performers will be paid through shared ticket-sale profits. While finances are modest, we are committed to creating a focused, collaborative, and artistically ambitious production.

ROLES AVAILABLE

Creon, Teiresias/Guard and Haemon

We strongly encourage performers of all backgrounds, ethnicities, genders, and abilities to apply. Casting will be inclusive and non-traditional, and all performers should be open to collaborative ensemble and chorus work.

As this production has already undergone an initial development and performance process, we are especially interested in actors who are adaptable, proactive, and confident learning material quickly.

Some roles are text-heavy and require strong memorisation skills, emotional range, physicality, and stamina.

REHEARSALS & PERFORMANCE

* Rehearsals will take place **in person in Highgate, London**.
* Rehearsal dates will be confirmed following casting selections, but rehearsals are expected to take place across **May, June, July and first week of August 2026***.
* Performances will take place on **8th & 9th August 2026**.
* Venue: **Barons Court Theatre, London**.
* Production presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**.

TO APPLY

Please email **antigone.production2026@gmail.com **with:

* The role(s) you would like to be considered for
* A headshot and CV and/or Spotlight link

Selected applicants will be sent a short self-tape audition script.

**Application deadline:** 20/05/2026 midnight

If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out via email.

Thank you,
**Ioanna & Una **

items.text:
STARS OF TOMORROW 

 @croydoncd_ Croydon

 Saturday 10th October

Models of Diversity is proud to present an unforgettable catwalk experience for young people aged 11–18 who have experienced adversity 

This empowering show is all about celebrating confidence, courage, individuality, and self-expression through fashion, fun, and creativity, with clothing from top brands including @newlook @nextofficial @prettylittlething @ganni and many more 

Our young stars will receive:

 Professional hair & make-up

 Wardrobe styling

 Catwalk coaching

 The chance to shine on the runway in front of family and friends

We’re looking for nominations from:

 Teachers

 Parents

 Responsible adults

To nominate a young person, please email:

 info@modelsofdiversity.org

Please include:

• First name & age

• A recent photo

• A short paragraph explaining why they would benefit from taking part

• Parent/guardian consent and contact details

Let’s celebrate bravery, resilience, and the stars of tomorrow 

[#StarsOfTomorrow](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/starsoftomorrow/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#ModelsOfDiversity](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/modelsofdiversity/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Croydon](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/croydon/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#YouthEmpowerment](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/youthempowerment/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#InclusiveFashion](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/inclusivefashion/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) BodyConfidence CatwalkExperience FashionForAll SelfExpression YoungPeople CroydonEvents

items.text:
Urgent Casting London
Short Film: Suzi

A paid short film looking for a Turkish actress to cover a drop off.

* Female

* Playing age: **45–55**

* **Turkish / Kurdish**

* Must speak **Turkish fluently**

* Warm, emotionally complex, naturalistic performer

* Strong subtle acting and emotional subtext preferred

 SHOOT DETAILS

* **Location:** London

* **Shoot Dates:** 22–23 May

* **Rate:** £200/day

* **Rehearsal:** Required prior to shoot

* **Urgent fast-turnaround casting** due to actor drop-off

A quiet, intimate drama focused on identity, memory, family, and belonging.

### TO APPLY

Please send:

* Headshot / recent photos

* CV or Spotlight link (if available)

Email: **[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)**

**Please confirm in your application that:**

* You speak Turkish

* You are available on 22–23 May

* You are London-based or able to travel to London

You can also add:

> Subject Line: “SUZI – [Your Name]”

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of ‎text that says '‎Suzi Aged Aged45-55 45 - 45-55 55 Turkish/Kurdish Turkish Kurdish م (SUZ (SUZAN) SUZI ROLE UZAN BREAKDOWN KEMAL' KEMAL'SAUNTY. WARM BUT COMPLEX-HE COMPLEX-HERSTORIES HER STORIES MOVE BETWEEN HUMOURAND AND PAIN. EMOTION SITS CLOSE TO THE SURFACE, OFTEN SPILLING OUT UNEXPECTEDLY. LOOKING FORANATURAL, FORA INSTINCTIVEPERFORMER. INSTINCTIVE PERFORMER. Mora‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'TITLE: ITLE:MIRAS LOGLINE: In his father's funeral, Kemal, young 2nd generation immigrant, begins the painful process of uncoveringhi his family's tu turbulent past when a S dialogue with his aunty forces him to confront the legacy they left behind. A quiet, intimate story about identity and belonging within the Alevi diaspora. Location: London Dates: 2 days Late May Paid Think restrained performances, emotional subtext, and naturalism. I'

items.text:
Now Casting: Princess Performers (Chicago)
We are casting performers to portray princess characters at children’s parties and events.

This role focuses on character acting, storytelling, and creating a high-energy, engaging experience for kids.

Requirements:

• Experience working with children required  

• Strong, expressive personality and ability to stay in character  

• Acting experience preferred  

• Weekend availability  

• Reliable transportation (events take place across Chicagoland, including suburbs)  

• Some days may include multiple events in different locations across Chicagoland (up to 50 miles total travel)  

We provide:

• Professional training  

• Costumes, wigs, and all props  

Pay: $60–$90 per 1-hour event (depending on role and experience)  

Most events are 1 hour.  

Additional travel compensation may be provided for longer distances.

Opportunity:

This is a great opportunity to monetize your performance skills and earn additional income on weekends through fun, creative work with children.

To apply, please send:

• Name  

• Location  

• Weekend availability  

• Brief experience with children and/or performance  

• Recent headshot or clear photo  

Casting process:

1. Short video audition (selected candidates)  

2. In-person casting/interview in Chicago

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – TikTok / Facebook Video Presenter (Manchester)

We’re looking for confident, natural on-camera presenters / actors to feature in short-form, social media-style videos, filmed on set in Manchester.

This is not traditional acting — we want people who feel comfortable talking directly to camera in a TikTok / Facebook Reels style. Think engaging, relatable, confident, and modern.

🔹 The Role

Present short, punchy scripts straight to camera

TikTok / Facebook-style delivery (15–60 seconds)

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

items.text:
🔥 FIRE PERFORMANCE CONTENT COLLAB 🔥

Hi everyone ✨
I’m a fire performer looking to connect with creatives for upcoming content shoots and collaborative projects.

I’m currently looking for:
📸 Photographers
🎥 Videographers
🎬 Content creators
✨ Other creatives/artists/models welcome too

I perform with fire swords, fans, torches and palm torches under my performance name FemmeDeFeu and I’m looking to create cinematic, artistic and high-energy content for socials, promo and future projects.

Open to:
• Creative shoots
• Reel/TikTok content
• Night shoots
• Styled/editorial concepts
• Collaborative passion projects

Based in Southampton but happy to travel for the right opportunities.

If you’re interested, drop your portfolio/Instagram below or send me a message ❤️‍🔥

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM PROJECT 🎬

We are currently casting REAL ACTORS for an upcoming passion-driven short film project.

This is a VOLUNTEER project, but it offers valuable experience, networking opportunities, exposure, and a chance to be part of something powerful and cinematic.

THE GOOD NEWS IS: We are NOT looking for extras.
We are looking for dedicated actors who can truly perform.

REQUIREMENTS:

• Must know how to act confidently
• Must be comfortable performing action/stunt SCENES even if it's your first time. 
• Passion, discipline, and commitment are important
• Team players with positive energy

This project is focused on building strong talent and creating high-quality work together.

📍Location details and full project information will be discussed in person.
🎭 Roles and shoot details will also be discussed directly with selected applicants.

If you believe you have the talent, confidence, and passion for film — contact 0639889467. 

#Casting #actionfilm #shortfilm #SouthAfricanCinema #actionmovie2026

items.text:
Hello Everyone,

I am Directing a music video for a Indie Pop band in Cambridge and I am in need of 2 male actors.

Over 18, but look as young as possible as the idea is about 2 teenagers best friends living a careless summer day of freedom.

Location: Cambridge.

Dates: 6/7th of June.

Pay: 100£ per day, per actor + good and travel covered. (Its a super micro budget video). It's one full day shoot. 

To possible candidates, will share much more information about the band, the film etc.

If you are intersted please email me directly on g.salgadofilms@gmail.com with your reel or on my Instagram @goncalosalgadodp

Thank you everyone.

items.text:
Hello. Need an actor right now for a shoot in a couple hours in Solihull anyone available? Preferably someone between mid 30s up to the 50s?

Needs to be wearing a business suit. Not a lot of lines to learn. Actor just cancelled last minute. Paid role.

It’s a short crime adult comedy film about two gangsters who turn up to an office and force a businessman to sign away his company but they can’ decide on how to hurt him. The role is of the businessman. Need you there for 8am. If you can make it, would be a massive help! Thanks
items.summary:

Needs to be wearing a business suit. Not a lot of lines to learn. Actor just cancelled last minute. Paid role.

It’s a short crime adult comedy film about two gangsters who turn up to an office and force a businessman to sign away his company but they can’ decide on how to hurt him. The role is of the businessman. Need you there for 8am. If you can make it, would be a massive help! Thanks

items.text:
Self tape services
Hi guys!

I hope you’re well. I’m looking to start offering self tape coaching and filming services for young actors, mainly aged 5–21

With self tapes now being such a huge part of the casting process, many auditions are done remotely, and I’ve noticed there’s a real need for young actors to have guidance and support throughout that process.

The way my service works is:

* Parents or actor (if above 18) would contact me directly regarding an audition/self-tape request.

* I’d review the brief and script beforehand so I can understand the character and prepare how best to coach the actor.

* I’d also advise parents/actor on suitable outfit choices based on the casting brief.

* During the session, I’d help the actor feel comfortable, guide them through the script, run practice takes, and offer coaching and direction throughout.

* I would then film the self-tape (acting as the reader where needed), edit the footage, and send the finished tape back ready for submission to their agent or casting director.

I have personal experience with auditioning and working on a film set, so I understand what casting teams are looking for in a strong self tape. While self-tapes don’t need a large professional studio setup, having the right guidance, lighting, framing, and environment can make a huge difference and really help the actor feel confident and prepared. 

If the actor has an in person audition and just wants someone to coach them through their audition script before their audition day I can offer this aswell! 

I am agency represented with experience in film and stage. 

If this is something anyone would potentially be interested in discussing further, please send me a message and we can go through further details.

Thank you!

Samantha x

topComments.text: Potentially - but self tapes often have such a quick turnaround that I have seen people try to offer this in the past but the short time scale makes it difficult in practice.

BYDGOSZCZ / okolice

PILNIE szukamy mężczyzny do roli OCHRONIARZA (security) do nowego serialu „In Cold Eyes”.

Zdjęcia: 18 maja
Stawka: 400 zł brutto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy

Szukamy wysokiego, dobrze zbudowanego, charakterystycznego mężczyzny o typowej prezencji ochroniarza.
Wzrost orientacyjnie od 180 cm.

Szukamy wyłącznie osób z Bydgoszczy lub okolic, które mogą samodzielnie dojechać na plan zdjęciowy.

Wszystkie zainteresowane osoby proszę o wiadomość prywatną wraz ze zdjęciem i wzrostem 🙂

items.text:
🎶🎞️ CASTING 🎞️🎶
Poszukujemy 2 osób, które były na koncercie Dawida Podsiadło i  mają wspólną ciekawą historię związaną z tym koncertem 🙂 
Szukamy osób z Katowic i bliskich okolic, ale rozważymy też inne miasta. 

Na podstawie prawdziwej historii uczestników będziemy kręcić filmik promocyjny dla jednej z marek, która patronuje nowej trasie Dawida. 

🎶 Nagrania odbędą się w Katowicach w dniach 5 i 6 czerwca. Za udział w nagraniach osoby otrzymają wynagrodzenie + wejście na koncert. 

📧 Zainteresowane osoby proszę o przesłanie zgłoszenia do mnie na maila: MONIKALUKASIEWICZCASTING@GMAIL.COM z tytułem ,,Koncert ”.  

Co zawrzeć w zgłoszeniu: 

- przedstawcie się: kim i skąd jesteście co Was łączy;  króciutko opowiedzcie jaką macie wspólną historię związana z koncertem Dawida 🙂 proszę też załączyć jedno Wasze aktualne zdjęcie - jeśli nagrywacie się na video to nie trzeba wysyłać zdjęcia. 

- albo napisz to w treści maila albo prześlijcie to w formie video i podeślij jako link do YouTube 

‼️ W odpowiedzi prześlemy wszystkie szczegóły. 

‼️ Zgłoszenia proszę przesyłać do 18 maja.

STATYŚCI  – SERIAL „MŁODE GLINY” 🎬
27-28.05
Warszawa 
Przechodnie, tłum, gapie!

Poszukujemy statystów do serialu „Młode gliny” w terminach:

📅 27.05, środa 
- Pan sąsiad 
- Pan świadek wypadku
- Ratownik medyczny, który będzie niósł aktorkę na noszach - szukamy sprawnej fizycznie osoby 
 
100 zł gotówką płatne po planie/os.

28.05, czwartek
- tłum przechodniów, osoby w różnym wieku, można się zgłaszać w duetach :) 
(ważne: prosimy o zabranie dodatkowych ubrań na zmianę) 

100 zł gotówką płatne po planie/os.

29.05, piątek
- chłopak ok. 18 lat - epizod niemy - 1 scena, typ luzaka, freestyle, "no stress", 150 zł płatne po planie 

Osoby, z którymi się kontaktowałam na inne, wcześniejsze dni i są wstępnie zapisane - proszę o niezgłaszanie się ponownie. Spróbuję Państwa potwierdzić w poniedziałek na czwartkowy plan. :) W razie niepotwierdzenia można oczywiście zgłaszać się na plan wyżej opisany.

Szukamy wyłącznie osób:
✔ dyspozycyjnych
✔ odpowiedzialnych
✔ punktualnych

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

paulina.miller@constantin-entertainment.pl

W zgłoszeniu prosimy podać:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• wzrost
• miasto zamieszkania
• informację, czy statystowałeś/aś już w serialu „Młode gliny”
• numer telefonu

INFORMACJĘ, JEŚLI JUŻ BYŁEŚ/AŚ W MG I KIM NA PLANIE!
Prosimy również o aktualne zdjęcia bez zbędnych nakryć głowy, okularów itp.

items.text:
Cześć 
Chciałabym się nauczyć robić wytryskująca, wypływająca krew, chciałbym nauczy się przerabiać lalki, pluszaki i inne na takie opętanie z wyglądu, zniszczone, popękane. 
Nie wiem czego użyć, jak się za to zabrać. 
Kołobrzeg

items.summary:
Cześć 
Chciałabym się nauczyć robić wytryskująca, wypływająca krew, chciałbym nauczy się przerabiać lalki, pluszaki i inne na takie opętanie z wyglądu, zniszczone, popękane. 
Nie wiem czego użyć, jak się za to zabrać. 
Kołobrzeg 
Zapraszam na priv, chętnie dołączę do konwersacji na messie, Discord. Porady mile widziane.

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬**

Role: University Professor
Gender: Male
Age Range: 40–55
Ethnicity: Caucasian

We are casting for a brief but meaningful role in an upcoming feature film. The character is a university professor whose assistant is once again late for work, and he is clearly unimpressed. Although there is no dialogue, the role carries emotional depth and strong screen presence.

📍 Location: **Surrey City Library, Surrey, BC**
📅 Shoot Date: **May 24, 2026**
⏰ Time: **10:00 AM – 11:00 AM**

This is a volunteer/unpaid position. Crafty and screen credits will be provided.

We are looking for someone expressive, natural, and comfortable conveying emotion through performance without dialogue.

Please send headshots and any acting reels/experience if available to **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

✨ CASTING CALL – MPP CHARACTER ENTERTAINMENT ✨
⭐ MALE PERFORMERS WANTED ⭐

MPP Character Entertainment is looking for talented male performers to bring our exciting character roles to life! Join our professional entertainment team performing as superheroes, cowboys, pirates and more at parties, events and immersive experiences.

🎭 ABOUT THE ROLEWe are casting performers with:• Strong characterisation and improvisation skills• High-energy, engaging performances• Confidence interacting with children and families

🤠 PERFORMER REQUIREMENTS• Full UK driving licence and access to a car• Outgoing, reliable and energetic personality• Weekend availability preferred• Based in or able to travel across Manchester / North West• Performance experience preferred but not essential

🌟 WHAT WE OFFER• Great rates of pay• Flexible freelance work• Supportive and creative team environment• Exciting themed events and performance opportunities

📸 HOW TO APPLYPlease send your CV and headshot/photo to:manager@mppcharacterentertainment.com

items.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.

You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette

Science Boffins

## **Free acting taster class!**

**VISIT ACTORSCAFE.CO.UK AND CLICK THE FREE TASTER CLASS TAB.**
## **SIGN UP TO OUR SPotlight Listed COURSES TODAY, SPACES ARE FILLING UP QUICKLY!**

**For all ages 18-80! and all acting abilities from novice to professional. Students are achieving their Spotlight accreditation, landing acting agents, and are developing strong confidence and realism in their craft.**

**Students have previously booked for TV Roles (BBC / ITV / Channel 4) commercials, Independent Feature Films, Short Films, voice dubbing (Netflix / Sky) and have landed fringe theatre productions.**

*CAMILLA ARTHUR CASTING "A massive 'hats off' to you and your team - and thank you. I am blown away with your teaching and your approach and just your generosity of spirit. I loved it."*

Venue: Watford, Finsbury Park, Chelmsford

Dates: May 2026

See actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class

**Professional Acting Tuition For All. Our Courses Teach Beginners to Advanced / Spotlight Actors.**

*ALEX SCANLAN. CAM ACTOR'S AGENCY - "Having visited the Actor's Cafe on three separate occasions now, I can really see the great work it produces."*

*CARL PROCTOR. CASTING DIRECTOR -"Everyone seemed to get a lot out of it. A nice group who seem to benefit hugely from you courses."*

*PAUL GIDDINGS. BBC TV DIRECTOR - "Thanks for having us at The Actors Cafe and for creating such a relaxed, positive and supportive environment."*

Apply at [actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class]

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LIAM HARKER
THERAPY GONE WRONG

Psychological Drama Feature Film

ROLE: LIAM HARKER

Playing Age: 16–20

Gender: Male

Location: UK Preferred

Production Type: Independent Feature Film

Tone: Gritty realism / psychological drama 

CHARACTER DESCRIPTION

Liam Harker is volatile, emotionally fractured, and constantly on edge. Growing up in a neglected small-town environment, Liam has learned to weaponise anger before vulnerability can reach the surface. He’s impulsive, defensive, and intimidating to most people around him—but underneath the aggression is someone deeply isolated and terrified of becoming invisible.

This role requires an actor capable of portraying:

* intense emotional realism

* explosive anger

* quiet vulnerability

* subtle psychological tension

Liam is not a stereotypical “troubled teen.”

He is the product of emotional neglect, pressure, and silence.

Contact : stagegeek2009@outlook.com

sharedPost.text:
🎥POSZUKIWANA TOYOTA YARIS I GENERACJI – ZŁOTY KOLOR🎥
Szukamy Toyoty Yaris I gen. w złotym kolorze na plan filmowy w Warszawie lub okolicach.
📍Lokalizacja: Warszawa / okolice
📍Termin: 17.05
📍Wynagrodzenie: 250 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
Auto będzie wykorzystywane jako tło/scenografia do zdjęć.

💌Jeśli masz takie auto lub znasz kogoś, kto ma - proszę o wiadomość prywatną ze zdjęciem samochodu na adres mailowy: ludzie@unagimedia.pl
💌W tytule wpisz TOYOTA 🚗

items.text:
**EDIT** Lighting filled. We are still looking for Costumer 

Hey folks! Renegade Theatre Company y  is looking to fill the positions of Lighting and Costume Designers for their summer community theatre production of A Midsummer Night's Dream. 
Rehearsals are Tues/Thurs nights and Sat mornings in the Virginia Highlands area. (For costume fittings - which need to begin ASAP)

Show dates are Thurs- Sun 6/11-6/20 (8pm shows Thurs-Sat, 2pm Show Sun and 6/20)
Strike 6/23
Tech Week 6/6-6/10

Preference for Lighting would be someone who is available majority tech/performances to set up and run light cues; for the Costumer availability for fittings/alterations/sourcing during rehearsals and tech.

We are an all volunteer team and most of the technical programming is user friendly - even for beginners! If you're interested or know someone who may be a good fit feel free to send me a DM or email RTC at renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com

items.text:
Hope this is okay to share here, as it’s very much in the spirit of helping creatives.

A new platform for creatives has just launched: Scenetribe

It’s designed to help people across the creative industries connect, build profiles and find opportunities.

The first 100 users to sign up will receive a free-for-life profile.

Worth taking a look if you work in acting, theatre, film, TV, voiceover or the wider creative industry.
items.previewTitle: The home for all creative careers | SceneTribe
items.previewDescription: SceneTribe helps creative professionals build public profiles, connect credits to productions, map collaborators, and prepare for casting discovery.
items.title: The home for all creative careers | SceneTribe

sharedPost.text:
007 CASTING AGENCY

Where Talent Meets Opportunity

EXCLUSIVE CASTING CALL — SOUTH AFRICAN COMMERCIAL CAMPAIGN

007 Casting Agency is currently seeking authentic South African talent for an upcoming premium TV commercial campaign filming in Sri Lanka for the South African market.

 MOM ROLE

We are seeking a Black South African woman who feels warm, grounded, natural, and genuinely relatable.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 30–35

• Medium-to-deep brown skin tone

• Natural 4B/4C hair or authentic cultural styling

• Healthy natural skin texture

• Warm smile and expressive eyes

• Soft, approachable features

• Genuine maternal energy

• Contemporary suburban South African presence

• No overly glamorous, editorial, or fashion-model aesthetics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PINK LADY ROLE

We are seeking someone energetic, humorous, charismatic, and naturally confident.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 20–30

• Medium-to-deep brown complexion

• Authentic Black South African features

• Natural textured African hair

• Athletic and physically active

• Relatable, vibrant presence rather than high-fashion or editorial

📍 IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Shoot Location: Sri Lanka
Tentative Shoot Dates: 12th–15th June 2026
Shoot Duration: 1 day
Usage: 2-year buyout for the South African market

All applicants must have a valid passport.

Talent Budget:
Up to R37,000

Final rates and contractual terms will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Production Covers:

- Return flights

- Hotel accommodation

- Per diem

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS

Please submit the following:

Updated comp card (including name, age, and contact details)

Professional studio headshot

Medium shot

Full-length photographs

Introduction video filmed in landscape mode

Submit via WhatsApp/Email
0692215294
info.007casting@gmail.com

Submission Deadline:
20th May 2026

Serious applicants only.

007 Casting Agency reserves the right to shortlist suitable candidates before client presentation.

items.previewTitle:
Unser 💙 Uwe verbindet Theater, Film und Fernsehen mit großer Rollenvielfalt und starker Präsenz. Besonders zuhause fühlt er sich in Action-, Abenteuer- und Krimiformaten, ebenso aber auch in der Comedy. Oft in markanten Antagonistenrollen besetzt, überzeugt er ebenso als vielschichtiger Protagonist. Mit Fechten und Karate (3. Kyu/Braungurt) bringt er zudem besondere Authentizität für körperlich anspruchsvolle Rollen mit.
📲 Anfragen @cinetastig 

#actorsmanagement #castingforfilm #actorslife #agencylife #management

Majestic Academy of Performing Arts is looking for NEW teachers to join our team and help us open our waiting lists! 💜💛

⭐ Dance Teachers

items.title: ✨ WE ARE GROWING ✨

sharedPost.text:
Hi guys,
I hope you’re well. I’m looking to start offering self tape coaching and filming services for young actors, mainly aged 5–18.
With self tapes now being such a huge part of the casting process, many auditions are done remotely, and I’ve noticed there’s a real need for young actors to have guidance and support throughout that process.
The way my service works is:
* Parents would contact me directly regarding an audition/self-tape request.
* I’d review the brief and script beforehand so I can understand the character and prepare how best to coach the actor.
* I’d also advise parents on suitable outfit choices based on the casting brief.
* During the session, I’d help the actor feel comfortable, guide them through the script, run practice takes, and offer coaching and direction throughout.
* I would then film the self-tape (acting as the reader where needed), edit the footage, and send the finished tape back ready for submission to their agent or casting director.
I have personal experience with auditioning and working on a film set, so I understand what casting teams are looking for in a strong self tape. While self-tapes don’t need a large professional studio setup, having the right guidance, lighting, framing, and environment can make a huge difference and really help the actor feel confident and prepared. 
If the actor has an in person audition and just wants someone to coach them through their audition script before their audition day I can offer this aswell! 
I am agency represented with experience in film and stage. 
If this is something you’d potentially be interested in discussing further, please send me a message and we can go through further details.
Thank you!
Samantha x

*करौली जिले में लगेंगे रोजगार शिविर तिथियां हुई निर्धारित*

 करौली जिले मे भारतीय सुरक्षा दस्ता परिषद नई दिल्ली के संयुक्त तत्वावधान में एसआईएस सिक्योरिटी द्वारा शिक्षित बेरोजगार युवाओं को रोजगार प्रदान करने के लिए सुरक्षा जवान 400 पद, सुरक्षा सुपरवाइजर 5 पद,सुरक्षा अधिकारी 5 पदो के लिए जिले मे ब्लॉक स्थरीय भर्ती (कैंप) शिविरों का अयोजन किया जाएगा जिनका बिवरण निम्न प्रकार है :-
*18 व 19 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर टोड़ाभीम मे*
*20 व 21 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर सपोटरा मे*
*22 व 23 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर हिण्डोन मे*
*25 व 26 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर मंडरायाल मे*
*27 व 28 मई को पंचायत समिति परिसर करौली मे*
*29 व 30 मई को पंचायत समिति नादौती मे भर्ती शिविरों का आयोजन रखा जायेगा.*

 भर्ती केम्प का समय प्रातः 10 बजे से दोपहर 3 बजे तक रहेगा। 

कमांडेंट कार्यालय उदयपुर से आए सेंटर हैड राकेश चौधरी एवं सहायक भर्ती अधिकारी दर्शन सिंह गुर्जर ने बताया कि सुरक्षा जवान के लिए 10 वीं, सुरक्षा सुपरवाइजर के लिए 12 वी, एवं सुरक्षा अधिकारी के लिए ग्रेजुएट उत्तीर्ण होना अनिवार्य है युवा की उम्र 19 से 40 वर्ष के मध्य होनी चाहिए। अभ्यर्थी की ऊँचाई 168 व 170 सेमी एवं बजन 55 से 90 किलोग्राम होना आवश्यक है। 

अभ्यर्थी अपनी 10 वीं व 12 वीं सहित समस्त शैक्षिक एवं प्रशैक्षिक योग्यता की अंकसूची, आधार कार्ड, पेन कार्ड की फोटोकॉपी एवं दो पासपोर्ट साईज फोटो व 350/- ऑनलाइन शुल्क के साथ भर्ती कैम्प में उपस्थित होकर आवेदन कर सकते है। 

अधिक जानकारी के लिए  हेल्पलाइन नंबर :- 9694371137, 7073744937.

कमांडेंट कार्यालय उदयपुर से आए राकेश चौधरी एवं सहायक भर्ती अधिकारी दर्शन सिंह गुर्जर ने बताया कि चयनित युवाओं को भारत सरकार एवं राजस्थान के औद्योगिक क्षेत्र में जैसे जोधपुर एम्स जोधपुर, ITI बाड़मेर, माइंस जेके सीमेंट निंबाहेड़ा, प्रेम मंदिर मथुरा,चित्तौड़गढ़ किला, कुंभलगढ़ किला, कोटा, जेसीबी जयपुर,निम्स यूनिवर्सिटी,सफारी जयपुर, एयरपोर्ट, मेट्रो,ताज होटल, ताज महल आगरा, लाल किला, रणथंबोर का किला,आई आई एम कॉलेज,सिंघानिया यूनिवर्सिटी, पेसिफिक हॉस्पिटल अस्पताल धार्मिक स्थल, गुजरात अहमदाबाद, राजकोट,गाँधीनगर मारुती, अरावली ताज सिक्योरमीटर उदयपुर, एवं ऐतिहासिक धरोहरों के साथ निजी क्षेत्र में नियुक्ति दी जाएगी 

सुरक्षा जवान को 15 हजार से 25 हजार व सुरक्षा सुपरवाईजर को 18 हजार से 28 हजार, स्नातक पास मासिक वेतन के साथ 65 वर्ष तक स्थाई नौकरी प्रदान की जाएगी। इसके साथ ही पीएफ , पेंशन, जीवन बीमा, मेडिकल, सालाना वेतन में वृद्धि, प्रमोशन, आवास एवं मेस आदि सुविधाएं भी दी जाएगी।
अधिक जानकारी के लिए हेल्पलाइन नंबर :- 9694371137,7073744937.

items.summary:
*करौली जिले में लगेंगे रोजगार शिविर तिथियां हुई निर्धारित*

 करौली जिले मे भारतीय सुरक्षा दस्ता परिषद नई दिल्ली के संयुक्त तत्वावधान में एसआईएस सिक्योरिटी द्वारा शिक्षित बेरोजगार युवाओं को रोजगार प्रदान करने के लिए सुरक्षा जवान 400 पद, सुरक्षा सुपरवाइजर 5 पद,सुरक्षा अधिकारी 5 पदो के लिए जिले मे ब्लॉक स्थरीय भर्ती (कैंप) शिविरों का अयोजन किया जाएगा जिनका बिवरण निम्न प्रकार है :-
*18 व 19 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर टोड़ाभीम मे*
*20 व 21 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर सपोटरा मे*
*22 व 23 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर हिण्डोन मे*
*25 व 26 मई 2026 को पंचायत समिति परिसर मंडरायाल मे*
*27 व 28 मई को पंचायत समिति परिसर करौली मे*
*29 व 30 मई को पंचायत समिति नादौती मे भर्ती शिविरों का आयोजन रखा जायेगा.*

 भर्ती केम्प का समय प्रातः 10 बजे से दोपहर 3 बजे तक रहेगा। 

कमांडेंट कार्यालय उदयपुर से आए सेंटर हैड राकेश चौधरी एवं सहायक भर्ती अधिकारी दर्शन सिंह गुर्जर ने बताया कि सुरक्षा जवान के लिए 10 वीं, सुरक्षा सुपरवाइजर के लिए 12 वी, एवं सुरक्षा अधिकारी के लिए ग्रेजुएट उत्तीर्ण होना अनिवार्य है युवा की उम्र 19 से 40 वर्ष के मध्य होनी चाहिए। अभ्यर्थी की ऊँचाई 168 व 170 सेमी एवं बजन 55 से 90 किलोग्राम होना आवश्यक है। 

अभ्यर्थी अपनी 10 वीं व 12 वीं सहित समस्त शैक्षिक एवं प्रशैक्षिक योग्यता की अंकसूची, आधार कार्ड, पेन कार्ड की फोटोकॉपी एवं दो पासपोर्ट साईज फोटो व 350/- ऑनलाइन शुल्क के साथ भर्ती कैम्प में उपस्थित होकर आवेदन कर सकते है। 

अधिक जानकारी के लिए  हेल्पलाइन नंबर :- 9694371137, 7073744937.

कमांडेंट कार्यालय उदयपुर से आए राकेश चौधरी एवं सहायक भर्ती अधिकारी दर्शन सिंह गुर्जर ने बताया कि चयनित युवाओं को भारत सरकार एवं राजस्थान के औद्योगिक क्षेत्र में जैसे जोधपुर एम्स जोधपुर, ITI बाड़मेर, माइंस जेके सीमेंट निंबाहेड़ा, प्रेम मंदिर मथुरा,चित्तौड़गढ़ किला, कुंभलगढ़ किला, कोटा, जेसीबी जयपुर,निम्स यूनिवर्सिटी,सफारी जयपुर, एयरपोर्ट, मेट्रो,ताज होटल, ताज महल आगरा, लाल किला, रणथंबोर का किला,आई आई एम कॉलेज,सिंघानिया यूनिवर्सिटी, पेसिफिक हॉस्पिटल अस्पताल धार्मिक स्थल, गुजरात अहमदाबाद, राजकोट,गाँधीनगर मारुती, अरावली ताज सिक्योरमीटर उदयपुर, एवं ऐतिहासिक धरोहरों के साथ निजी क्षेत्र में नियुक्ति दी जाएगी

sharedPost.text:
🐈‍⬛💰Pamiętasz emocje, gdy cała Polska wstrzymywała oddech przy otwieraniu bramek? WRACAMY! Reaktywujemy kultowe show
 „IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ” i szukamy właśnie Ciebie! 📺✨#BawSięiWygrywaj 

Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:
• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡
• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡
• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!
•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:
• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.
• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ (wymagany język polski). Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

🎭 EXTRA: Im bardziej szalony strój, tym lepiej! Przebierz się za dinozaura, policjanta, albo załóż najbardziej kolorowe ciuchy, jakie masz w szafie. Zróbmy show, o którym będzie głośno! 🦖🎨

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Nie zwlekaj, miejsca w studio znikają szybciej niż nagrody z bramek!
Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL
Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ
W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.text:
🎬 **PILNY CASTING – SERIAL “IN COLD ICE”**
📍 **Bydgoszcz i okolice**

Szukamy aktorów do serialu **„In Cold Ice”**.
Zdjęcia odbywają się **w języku angielskim**.

📅 Termin zdjęć: **15–18 maja**
🎥 Jeden dzień zdjęciowy na rolę.
🔹 HOKEISTA
* młody mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* wymagana komunikatywna znajomość języka angielskiego
* jedna kwestia po angielsku

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **600 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 OCHRONIARZ
* mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* rola bez kwestii

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **400 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 PASTOR
* mężczyzna w średnim wieku
* bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego
* rola z tekstem

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **1000 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

📩 Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o wiadomość prywatną
i przesłanie od razu:
* krótkiego **self-introduction po angielsku**
* wieku
* aktualnych zdjęć
* doświadczenia aktorskiego (jeśli jest)

🎬 Casting pilny!

📅 Termin zdjęć: **15–18 maja**
🎥 Jeden dzień zdjęciowy na rolę.
🔹 HOKEISTA
* młody mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* wymagana komunikatywna znajomość języka angielskiego
* jedna kwestia po angielsku

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **600 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 OCHRONIARZ
* mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* rola bez kwestii

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **400 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 PASTOR
* mężczyzna w średnim wieku
* bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego
* rola z tekstem

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **1000 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

📩 Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o wiadomość prywatną
i przesłanie od razu:
* krótkiego **self-introduction po angielsku**
* wieku
* aktualnych zdjęć
* doświadczenia aktorskiego (jeśli jest)

Hello everyone,
For a short film that will be submitted to international festivals next year, we are looking for a 5–6-year-old girl with a natural and sincere acting ability.
Please apply only for this child role, as the adult cast has already been selected.

Logline:
A mother haunted by the psychological wounds of her childhood unintentionally causes the death of her young daughter.

Character Breakdown : Amy
Girl, 5–6 years old
White / Caucasian
Language: English
Appearance: Long hair, preferably black or brown eyes 
Location of shooting :Los Angeles 

Shooting Dates (Approx.): End of July

Unpaid role — however, screen credit, a copy of the reel/film, and festival attendance opportunities will be provided.

Cheers 
Bella

CASTING

ROLE - ATTACKER DAX

The attacker version of the lead male, he is masked the entire show and his face is never revealed. Lots of stage time and a vital role in the play.

Experience with stage combat and/or physical theatre preferred.

FULL LENGTH SUSPENSEFUL ROMANTIC HORROR PLAY.

Looking for someone Male, slim/muscly, 6ft 2” or 6ft 3” with brown hair to match the lead male.

Ethnicity: White 

Required Media: Headshot/Photo, Video Reel, Cover Letter

LONDON, UK ONLY.

ALL INFORMATION ON THE POSTER

Payment - Profit share, equal split between all 3 actors and the backstage crew/tech.

Dates - Rehearsals every week on a Sunday from June (dates to be confirmed), 2 week run in a London theatre (or 2) over Halloween (exactly dates to follow).

To apply send a DM or email info@distortedrebels.com

items.text:
***Casting Call - Toots***

We at Pineal Dreams Productions are deep into production on our fourth in-house film - Ouroboros - as well as working on a tangential project - Through The Doorway.

We have a pretty healthy track record of success, picking up 23 festival submissions and 15 awards through our first three works - Inside The Abyss (2022), Our Father (2024), And BARDO (2025)

We are delighted to announce we will be teaming up with T.A.F Productions and director Andy Cory for a short-film written by Joshua Mouline (who will be acting as co-producer) - Toots.

We are casting for one actress - and this will be a dual role which we believe will give the chosen candidate a fantastic chance to develop experience, showcase their talent - as well as walk away with a fantastic showreel of footage featuring just themselves.

It also a PAID role (though quite minimal, as it is a self-funded indie project)

***Character Profile :  C/ Shadow C***

The story of Toots is a very simple one - as one person is forced to confront a manifestation of their own conscience and forced via a conversation to accept their mistakes, who they are, and come to terms with the consequences of their actions.

C is a mysterious character at first. She is deeply in denial about her own flaws, confrontational and quick to anger. As the conversation progresses, we learn more about her dual-nature and the inner conflict she has between accepting who she is and taking responsibility for her own decisions/choices - and passing the blame to the trauma that she has gone through. Despite the short being one lengthy scene, essentially, C is a very complex character with a lot of layers that get peeled away as the story progresses.

Shadow C is a combination of C’s subconscious ID (her inner truth or shadow-self) but while acting in an antagonistic way towards C - she is actually her own conscience. She is simply C’s buried regrets and self-awareness, trying to make her understand who she is, so that she can finally change, grow and move on from the past. She is a helper, not an enemy.

The ideal candidate would be:

* A young actress (20-25) looking for that break-out role that could really elevate them
* Somebody prepared to take on the challenge of an entire short (Only 16 pages, so probably 20 minutes maximum) where they are the only cast member, and it would be built entirely around them.
* Somebody who is a particularly strong character actor, capable of playing two halves of one person with convincing distinction.

Filming Details:

* Two tapes will be expected for the audition based on material sent over. One to see each version of C.
* 
* Details of filming are yet to be confirmed - but will be within the greater London region.

* Filming dates are expected to be around 2 months after casting - allowing the actress enough time to prepare properly for the role.

* The likely filming days total would be around 2 perhaps 3. (Though if extra days were needed, this can be discussed and payment adjusted accordingly)

* Filming likely to place in August and be wrapped within the same month. (Though this could change due to circumstance)

This is a PAID role (though minimal, as we are an independent studio). Transport and food of course also covered - and you can select any 3 minutes of your own choice for showreel material once the film is completed.

The film is an exploration of the inner struggle of trying to accept the difference between what happened to you - your traumas - and who you are inherently as a human being. While a simple film - taking place in only two locations - it is a relatively complex theme and asks some interesting questions about what it means to be human. What makes a person a bad person, and what is just a mistake. Who are we? Ourselves, or what happened to us?

This a film that would likely appeal to somebody with an interest in arthouse cinema.

Anybody with interest please either Email:

[Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk](mailto:Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk)

[Moulinie23@gmail.com](mailto:Moulinie23@gmail.com)

Kind Regards,

Joshua Moulinié

Despite the short being one lengthy scene, essentially, C is a very complex character with a lot of layers that get peeled away as the story progresses.

Shadow C is a combination of C’s subconscious ID (her inner truth or shadow-self) but while acting in an antagonistic way towards C - she is actually her own conscience. She is simply C’s buried regrets and self-awareness, trying to make her understand who she is, so that she can finally change, grow and move on from the past. She is a helper, not an enemy.

The ideal candidate would be:

* A young actress (20-25) looking for that break-out role that could really elevate them
* Somebody prepared to take on the challenge of an entire short (Only 16 pages, so probably 20 minutes maximum) where they are the only cast member, and it would be built entirely around them.
* Somebody who is a particularly strong character actor, capable of playing two halves of one person with convincing distinction.

Filming Details:

* Two tapes will be expected for the audition based on material sent over. One to see each version of C.
* 
* Details of filming are yet to be confirmed - but will be within the greater London region.

* Filming dates are expected to be around 2 months after casting - allowing the actress enough time to prepare properly for the role.

* The likely filming days total would be around 2 perhaps 3. (Though if extra days were needed, this can be discussed and payment adjusted accordingly)

* Filming likely to place in August and be wrapped within the same month. (Though this could change due to circumstance)

This is a PAID role (though minimal, as we are an independent studio). Transport and food of course also covered - and you can select any 3 minutes of your own choice for showreel material once the film is completed.

The film is an exploration of the inner struggle of trying to accept the difference between what happened to you - your traumas - and who you are inherently as a human being. While a simple film - taking place in only two locations - it is a relatively complex theme and asks some interesting questions about what it means to be human. What makes a person a bad person, and what is just a mistake. Who are we? Ourselves, or what happened to us?

This a film that would likely appeal to somebody with an interest in arthouse cinema.

Anybody with interest please either Email:

[Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk](mailto:Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk)

[Moulinie23@gmail.com](mailto:Moulinie23@gmail.com)

Kind Regards,

Joshua Moulinié
items.title: ***Casting Call - Toots***

items.text:
Do you have a fear of public speaking or wish you could feel more comfortable when delivering a talk? We are excited to be launching "The Speakers Lab" in central London - a place where people can come to learn the techniques of public speaking and to practice in a warm, supported and non judgemental environment. 

The course takes place every Tuesday over six weeks and culminates in everyone sharing a short talk.

Through improvisation games, speaking exercises and discussion you will steadily build your confidence in speaking over the weeks. 
 
Led by actor and public speaking expert Kate Gilbert. This is aimed at beginner to intermediate - anyone who would love to speak up more in meetings or feel less stressed when delivering presentations at work. 

Here are the details: 

Dates: Tuesday 9th of June to 14th of July 2026
Time: 6pm - 7pm 
Location: Old Diorama, Drummond Street, London 
nearest tube Warren Street

Follow the link to book your place: 

https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/the-speakers-lab-tickets-1988894715634

PLEASE FEEL FREE TO SHARE THIS WITH PEOPLE WHO MAY BE INTERESTED 🌷

We also offer an advanced course called "The Confident Speaker" where I teach you how to create a 6-8 minute talk and deliver it to an invited audience. Here is the link... 

https://kategilbert.co.uk/confident-speaker-lab/

Email us for more details office@kategilbert.co.uk

#PublicSpeaking #publicspeakinganxiety #publicspeakingtips #confidence

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – KURZFILM „CARLINA“

Für unseren poetischen Kurzfilm *CARLINA* suchen wir Darsteller*innen für vier zentrale Rollen.

Der Film erzählt von Nähe, Sehnsucht, Verlust und unausgesprochenen Spannungen in der Abgeschiedenheit einer alpinen Bergwelt. Im Mittelpunkt stehen starke emotionale Präsenz, reduziertes Spiel und Ausdruck über Blick, Körpersprache und Stille.

📍 Drehort: Nähe Lunz am See, Niederösterreich
📅 Drehzeitraum: 05.06.2026 – 11.06.2026
🎞 Studentenproduktion / No-Budget
🍽 Unterkunft & Verpflegung vorhanden
🎥 Festival-Einreichungen geplant

Gesucht werden Darsteller*innen für die Rollen:
– Magdalena
– Johann
– Lukas
– Wolfgang

Alle weiteren Informationen zu Rollen, Anforderungen und Projekt findet ihr in den Bildern des Posts.

📩 Bewerbungen bitte bis spätestens **17.05.2026** an:
**hochland.kurzfilm@gmail.com**

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

items.title: 🎬 CASTING CALL — FEMALE HOST

items.text:
Hi, I’m Mayanne CK — model, actress, and creative based in Ottawa (dual citizen) currently looking to update both my modelling and acting portfolios.  

I’m interested in test shoots, updated headshots, creative concepts, film opportunities, castings, and future collaborations with photographers, casting directors, brands, stylists, MUAs, and other creatives.  

I have experience in runway, commercial, print, film, and theatre work, and I’m always excited to connect with passionate creatives and build strong professional relationships.  

(Also finally able to share some BTS + released work from previous projects.)  

If you’re looking for someone adaptable, expressive, professional, easygoing, and confident on camera — I’d love to connect.  

📍 Ottawa / Available for travel  
📩 Open to collabs, castings & bookings: mayanneckinquiries@gmail.com 
IG: @mayanne_ck

**Now Covered**
We are looking for some high energy role actors for a training event on 20th June in London, EC4a. The training event is security and first aid focused. 

£180 incl 1400-1830hrs. Please DM if you would like to be considered. 

Thanks very much. 

Dan.

items.summary: Actress for Short/music video needed
items.title: Actress for Short/music video needed

items.text:
Urgent casting London
Short Film: Suzi

A paid short film looking for a Turkish actress to cover a drop off.

* Female

* Playing age: **45–55**

* **Turkish / Kurdish**

* Must speak **Turkish fluently**

* Warm, emotionally complex, naturalistic performer

* Strong subtle acting and emotional subtext preferred

 SHOOT DETAILS

* **Location:** London

* **Shoot Dates:** 22–23 May

* **Rate:** £200/day

* **Rehearsal:** Required prior to shoot

* **Urgent fast-turnaround casting** due to actor drop-off

A quiet, intimate drama focused on identity, memory, family, and belonging.

### TO APPLY

Please send:

* Headshot / recent photos

* CV or Spotlight link (if available)

Email: **[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)**

**Please confirm in your application that:**

* You speak Turkish

* You are available on 22–23 May

* You are London-based or able to travel to London

You can also add:

> Subject Line: “SUZI – [Your Name]”

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of ‎text that says '‎Suzi Aged Aged45-55 45 - 45-55 55 Turkish/Kurdish Turkish Kurdish م (SUZ (SUZAN) SUZI ROLE UZAN BREAKDOWN KEMAL' KEMAL'SAUNTY. WARM BUT COMPLEX-HE COMPLEX-HERSTORIES HER STORIES MOVE BETWEEN HUMOURAND AND PAIN. EMOTION SITS CLOSE TO THE SURFACE, OFTEN SPILLING OUT UNEXPECTEDLY. LOOKING FORANATURAL, FORA INSTINCTIVEPERFORMER. INSTINCTIVE PERFORMER. Mora‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'TITLE: LE:MIRAS LOGLINE: In his father's funeral, Kemal, young 2nd generation immigrant, begins the painful process of uncovering his Family' S turbulent past when a dialogue with his aunty forces him to confront the legacy they left behind. A quiet, intimate story about identity and belongin within the Alevi diaspora. Location: London Dates: 2 days Late May Paid Think restrained performances, emotional subtext, and naturalism. ለረ I'

A quiet, intimate story about identity and belongin within the Alevi diaspora. Location: London Dates: 2 days Late May Paid Think restrained performances, emotional subtext, and naturalism. ለረ I'

items.summary:
Urgent Casting London
Short Film: Suzi

A paid short film looking for a Turkish actress to cover a drop off.

* Female

* Playing age: **45–55**

* **Turkish / Kurdish**

* Must speak **Turkish fluently**

* Warm, emotionally complex, naturalistic performer

* Strong subtle acting and emotional subtext preferred

 SHOOT DETAILS

* **Location:** London

* **Shoot Dates:** 22–23 May

* **Rate:** £200/day

* **Rehearsal:** Required prior to shoot

* **Urgent fast-turnaround casting** due to actor drop-off

A quiet, intimate drama focused on identity, memory, family, and belonging.

### TO APPLY

Please send:

* Headshot / recent photos

* CV or Spotlight link (if available)

Email: **[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)**

**Please confirm in your application that:**

* You speak Turkish

* You are available on 22–23 May

* You are London-based or able to travel to London

You can also add:

> Subject Line: “SUZI – [Your Name]”

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (Vancouver) — WICKEDWOLF MEDIA**

Short comedic project filming in the next 2–3 weeks. Shoot will last approximately 2.5 hours. Compensation: $150 flat per role. Non-union.

Seeking 5–6 high-energy, native English-speaking performers (M/F), ages 18–45. Local applicants only. Shoot date will be finalized after cast selection based on availability; ideally an afternoon shoot.

Role: Performers will portray a group of friends playing an indie adult party game — loud, varied, and highly expressive laughter, plus improvised comments and reactions. This is fast, funny, and irreverent.

To apply: Please message here OR email a recent photo and brief bio or resume link to michael@wickedwolf.media. Please include your city and phone number.

Submission deadline: May 22, 5pm.

topComments.text: Michael, could you provide a shoot location and date?
Do I need to be a Caucasian to apply?

items.text:
BACKGROUND CASTING CALL - BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS
Hi!

We are looking for background for our upcoming short film filming May 20th - 22nd, 2026.

We are looking for a DIVERSE RANGE of actors, of all ages 18+, nationalities, and gender identities, to play a wide range of BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS.

Please note this is an unpaid opportunity but you will be provided lots of very delicious food and lunch on set!!

We are filming in Port Coquitlam.

Please let us know which days you are available, you can choose to do only one of the days, two, or all three days!

If interested, please email or DM me or fill out the following form —[ https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6](https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6)

THE AUTHORITY .. it will be historically groundbreaking !!! It will be the only drama series in the entire world based off of transit! Bus driving being one of the most dangerous and stressful jobs in the United States! We will touch on every dramatic and traumatic aspect of it! 

Audition link 
https://linktr.ee/TheAuthorityAuditions 

Sunday May 17th and 24th 2p-6p 
@ Zav 27 
12403 Superior Ave 
Cleveland Ohio
items.title: 🔥 CASTING CALL 🔥 new drama series

items.text:
Most actors don’t lose roles because they can’t act.
They lose them because nobody taught them what actually matters in the room.

Most classes focus on scenes and technique. This class focuses on the part many actors are missing:
• Audition technique  
• Presence  
• Confidence under pressure  
• On camera connection  
• The business side of acting  
• What casting directors are actually looking for  

Raquel Gardner brings both acting and casting experience, giving actors real insight into how to stand out professionally, not just creatively.

Actors never stop learning. Neither should your craft.

Los Angeles • 303 Studios

https://303studiola.com/acting-class

818-223-7829

items.text:
**Casting Call Alert!**

We’re looking for Berlin based actors for *The Runner* a 15 minute student short film-a dramedy / coming of age / love story set in modern-day Berlin.

 **Production Name:** The runner
 **Location:** Berlin
 **Duration:** 5 shooting days (+1 rehearsal day)
 **Deadline for Application:** 25th May
 **Payment:** Negotiable (low-budget student production)
 **Shooting Dates:** July 21-27 
 Produced as part of the Master’s program at MetFilm School Berlin

If you're interested, please send your headshot, CV, and/or demo reel to:
 **abril.arap.film@gmail.com**

sharedPost.text:
😲💫 Absolutely overwhelmed by the talent of the Shen Yun dancers — it's unbelievable. 

🎟️ Find the nearest cinema and buy tickets 👉 https://1kb.link/qJDkdm

⚡️ This isn't something you can fully appreciate through a screen — you have to experience the magic, beauty, and energy firsthand.

✨ Trust me, it's a night you'll never forget.

items.text:
🎭 **Casting Female Performers – KPop Demon Hunters Theme (HUNTR/X)** 🎤✨

We’re casting **2 female performers (16+ / 18+)** for a fun, high-energy children’s party experience!

## 💖 Roles:

🩷 **Mira**
🖤 **Zoey ** 

## 📅 Event Details:

📍 Kinnelon, NJ
🗓️ May 16, 2026

⏰ Arrival: 4:15 PM
🎉 Performance: 5:00 – 6:00 PM

## 🎭 What You’ll Do:

✨ Meet & greet with kids
🎶 Music & dance interaction
🎈 Simple balloon twisting *(can teach basics!)*
💫 Fun, high-energy character engagement

## 💰 Pay:

**$140 flat rate**

## 🌟 We’re looking for:

✔ Reliable & punctual
✔ Comfortable with kids
✔ Positive, energetic presence
✔ Dance/movement friendly *(no professional experience required!)*

## 🎥 Auditions:

📲 Virtual (Zoom)
🗓️ By appointment

## 📩 To apply:

Use the link below or send a message
👉 Include: **“KPop Demon Hunters – May 16”**

[https://forms.gle/QE2he3KXMaDfwcGq9](https://forms.gle/QE2he3KXMaDfwcGq9)

## 💫 Bonus:

If you know someone who’d be a great fit, feel free to share!

items.text:
Looking for A2/Sound Engineer for ‘Next to Normal’ (CHI)
My company Scene Five Productions is in search of an A2/Sound Engineer for our upcoming production of Next to Normal.

We are looking for a candidate who is comfortable live-mixing our actors mics. 

Our production runs over two weekends, at the Bramble Arts Loft: July 24th-26th and July 31-August 2nd. Additionally, our tech days are July 20th-23rd.

This position will have a stipend of $500.

If interested, please email scenefiveproductions@gmail.com with your resume!
items.summary:

items.text:
Meet Lisa from Shoes Off At The Door — 
We’ve put together a brief monologue for those looking to audition for her character!! WE STILL GOT ROLES TO FILL SIGN UP NOW🔥🔥

We’re looking for raw talent, strong personalities, and storytellers from ALL backgrounds.

NO experience required.
Just bring authenticity, energy, and emotion.

🎬 Audition Theme:
“How would you act at a BBQ?”

🔗 Sign up in bio on IG @shoesoffatthedoorindy
📍 Indianapolis Production
📩 Submit audition videos:
shoesoffatthedoor@yahoo.com

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’ll be in Berlin from June 1 to June 5.

I’m looking for female models and dancers for TFP photo shoots during this time.

I mainly shoot female portraits and dance photography, in urban streets or in nature.

If you’re interested, feel free to DM me 😊
IG: @hughleo1994

Please include your photos or IG when messaging.

Daqui a pouco o último
LOVE de Ana Lázaro 

14 a 16 MAIO 
Quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 
Biblioteca Municipal 
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/.../176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m.../

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES 

encenação, espaço cénico  MARIA JOÃO LUÍS 
vídeo  JOSÉ BUDHA
música  JAIME FILIPE 
assistência de encenação  SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção  FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA 
direção de produção, luz  PEDRO DOMINGOS 

produção  TEATRO DA TERRA  2026
M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio 
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude, Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

Faculty: 
**Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷 
**Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳 
**Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰 
**Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: 
**Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳 
**Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮 
**Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮 
**Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭 
**Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

>> Michael Chekhov Acting Technique 
>> Organic Breathing & Image Work
>> Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre (Kerala, India) 
>> Physical Theatre and Dance (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> The Actor’s Energy and Presence 
>> Intercultural Theatre in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

Hey everyone,

my name is Kai and I’m currently based in London.

I’ve been consistently training in acting and already have experience in front of the camera through modeling, as well as being involved in a few independent short film and creative projects.

Working on camera and being part of creative productions is something I genuinely enjoy, so I’m open to all kinds of opportunities — short films, music videos, student productions, commercials, fashion/editorial shoots and other creative projects. 🙌🏻

Languages: English & German  
Height: 178 cm  
Available for castings & self tapes

items.title: Hey everyone,

items.text:
***Casting Call - Toots***

We at Pineal Dreams Productions are deep into production on our fourth in-house film - Ouroboros - as well as working on a tangential project - Through The Doorway.

We have a pretty healthy track record of success, picking up 23 festival submissions and 15 awards through our first three works - Inside The Abyss (2022), Our Father (2024), And BARDO (2025)

We are delighted to announce we will be teaming up with T.A.F Productions and director Andy Cory for a short-film written by Joshua Moulinié (who will be acting as co-producer) - Toots.

We are casting for one actress - and this will be a dual role which we believe will give the chosen candidate a fantastic chance to develop experience, showcase their talent - as well as walk away with a fantastic showreel of footage featuring just themselves.

It also a PAID role (though quite minimal, as it is a self-funded indie project)

***Character Profile :  C/ Shadow C***

The story of Toots is a very simple one - as one person is forced to confront a manifestation of their own conscience and forced via a conversation to accept their mistakes, who they are, and come to terms with the consequences of their actions.

C is a mysterious character at first. She is deeply in denial about her own flaws, confrontational and quick to anger. As the conversation progresses, we learn more about her dual-nature and the inner conflict she has between accepting who she is and taking responsibility for her own decisions/choices - and passing the blame to the trauma that she has gone through. Despite the short being one lengthy scene, essentially, C is a very complex character with a lot of layers that get peeled away as the story progresses.

Shadow C is a combination of C’s subconscious ID (her inner truth or shadow-self) but while acting in an antagonistic way towards C - she is actually her own conscience. She is simply C’s buried regrets and self-awareness, trying to make her understand who she is, so that she can finally change, grow and move on from the past. She is a helper, not an enemy.

The ideal candidate would be:

* A young actress (20-25) looking for that break-out role that could really elevate them
* Somebody prepared to take on the challenge of an entire short (Only 16 pages, so probably 20 minutes maximum) where they are the only cast member, and it would be built entirely around them.
* Somebody who is a particularly strong character actor, capable of playing two halves of one person with convincing distinction.

Filming Details:

* Two tapes will be expected for the audition based on material sent over. One to see each version of C.
* 
* Details of filming are yet to be confirmed - but will be within the greater London region.

* Filming dates are expected to be around 2 months after casting - allowing the actress enough time to prepare properly for the role.

* The likely filming days total would be around 2 perhaps 3. (Though if extra days were needed, this can be discussed and payment adjusted accordingly)

* Filming likely to place in August and be wrapped within the same month. (Though this could change due to circumstance)

This is a PAID role (though minimal, as we are an independent studio). Transport and food of course also covered - and you can select any 3 minutes of your own choice for showreel material once the film is completed.

The film is an exploration of the inner struggle of trying to accept the difference between what happened to you - your traumas - and who you are inherently as a human being. While a simple film - taking place in only two locations - it is a relatively complex theme and asks some interesting questions about what it means to be human. What makes a person a bad person, and what is just a mistake. Who are we? Ourselves, or what happened to us?

This a film that would likely appeal to somebody with an interest in arthouse cinema.

Anybody with interest please either Email:

[Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk](mailto:Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk)

[Moulinie23@gmail.com](mailto:Moulinie23@gmail.com)

Kind Regards,

Joshua Moulinié

topComments.text: where is the filming location please?

items.text:
Individual audition slots are filled!
DM or email 
DarkTheatreDale@proton.me 
For your information and submission pack 

🎥 Video submissions close 26 May 2026

Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill's 
The incendiary play presented by Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. 

This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 

He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.

The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 

This time, they get the ending they earned.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
 

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions
